description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, compute the Floating Algae Index (FAI) over water bodies using the Landsat multi-spectral image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (containing band_1: SWIR1, band_2: NIR, band_3: Red, and band_4: Green). Compute a band named 'NDWI' using the formula (band_4 - band_2) / (band_4 + band_2). Compute a band named 'FAI' using the baseline subtraction formula band_2 - (band_3 + (band_1 - band_3) * 0.22) and set its valid-pixel expression to NDWI > 0.0. Save the product in BEAM-DIMAP
